completion_promises.criterion_text: Integration tests are marker-gated (`@pytest.mark.integration`) and excluded from the hermetic unit gate.
completion_promises.evidence: All tests in test_retrieval_pipeline.py are decorated with @pytest.mark.integration. Verified by running pytest without -m integration flag, which deselected all 5 tests (0 selected, 5 deselected). The pyproject.toml configuration excludes integration tests by default via addopts = '-m "not integration"'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A populated ephemeral store + real embed returns project-scoped, cosine-ranked results for a real query.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_real_embed_returns_project_scoped_ranked_results which writes 3 documents with varying relevance to 'database connection pooling' query, executes search with real embeddings via store_context_real fixture, and verifies: (1) all results are project-scoped, (2) results ordered by cosine score descending, (3) most relevant document ranks highest. Uses DeterministicWriter and real embed service.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Supersession exclusion holds end-to-end against records written by the deterministic writer (FEAT-MEM-03).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_supersession_exclusion_end_to_end which writes doc v1, then doc v2 with supersedes=[v1] via DeterministicWriter. Verifies: (1) search with include_superseded=False excludes v1, includes v2, (2) search with include_superseded=True includes both v1 and v2. Tests full end-to-end supersession flow from writer through search.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Budgeted assembly stays within budget when measured against a real assembled block (AC-1) over real corpus content.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_budgeted_assembly_respects_token_limit which writes 10 technical documents with substantial content, searches with token_budget=200, and assembles context. Verifies: (1) assembly.tokens_used <= 200 (strict budget compliance), (2) coverage_score in [0.0, 1.0], (3) context_block non-empty, (4) contributing_types metadata populated. Tests real token measurement against actual corpus.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The probe-set harness runs the frozen query set against the real (re-indexed) corpus and emits a parity report.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_probe_harness_runs_against_real_corpus which writes known corpus, defines frozen probe set with baseline answers, executes run_probe_harness with search and assemble functions, and verifies ParityReport structure: total_probes, divergences_count, full_parity, meets_minimum_size, divergent_queries fields. Confirms harness runs end-to-end and generates structured report.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests use a throwaway, random-port instance (no NAS dependency).
completion_promises.evidence: All tests use ephemeral_pg fixture which creates UUID-based Docker Compose project with random port allocation. Implemented test_ephemeral_fixture_uses_random_port to verify DSN uses non-5432 port in valid ephemeral range (1024-65536). Confirmed by running all integration tests - each gets isolated throwaway instance on random port.
